headline: Poch RAGE-QUITS 💔⚽ USA Dream 🇺🇸🍔 After BaloGate 🔥🔴
text: Seattle Stadium went from FIREWORKS 🎆💥 to FUNERAL 🪦😭 as USA 🇺🇸 DREAM 💭🚫 got SMACKED 4-1 by Belgium 🧇🍟 in SHAMBOLIC last-16 EXIT 🚪💨! Pochettino 😤👔 felt 'DISAPPOINTED 😩 with too many PEOPLE 🤡 who brought POLITICS 🗳️🔥 and MANIPULATION 🧠🤥 into the GAME 🏈⚽' after the BALOGUN SAGA 🍌🟥 made FIFA 🤡 suspend his RED CARD 🔴 for 12 MONTHS 📅, letting Folarin 🇳🇬⚽ start despite Trump 🍊👑 'asking' FIFA to REVIEW 🤔 the FOUL! Belgium full-back Castagne 😏 said 'WORLD 🌍 on OUR SIDE against USA' while Balogun 🐐 shrugged 'controversial? I accepted BOTH decisions 🤷‍♂️' and Poch went FULL DAD MODE 👨‍👧 'no EXCUSE, wasn't our DAY ☀️ but INSULTS 💩 and BAD MESSAGES 📱 hurt PERSONAL 😢'! De Ketelaere 🎩⚽ TAP-IN OPENER then HEADER HEROICS 🗣️💦 gave Belgians 2-0 before USA EQUALIZED only to watch Freese 🧤😵 get TACKLED and Vanaken SIDE-FOOT 3-1 from OUTSIDE THE BOX 📦! Lukaku 🐐⏰ injury-time STRIKE sent MORE FANS 🏃‍♂️🚪 fleeing like the AMERICAN DREAM 🍔🦅 just got CANCELLED ❌! Poch admitted 'we DIDN'T CONNECT 🔌 from the WHISTLE 🟨, never IN the GAME even after EQUALIZER' while Tyler Adams 🗣️💪 said 'BAD DAY 😞 but if we INSPIRE kids 🧒 then MISSION ACCOMPLISHED ✅'! Fans packed BARS 🍺 and FAN ZONES but now wonder if BaloGate 🗞️ and TRUMP INTERVENTION 🇺🇸🤝 killed the VIBES or if USA is just 'not THERE YET' in FOOTBALL CULTURE ⚽🌍! Poch's CONTRACT 📝 expires at WORLD CUP END 🏁 so next WEEKS bring REST 😴, THINKING 🧠 and FEDERATION CHATS 💬 – will he STAY or will the DREAM 🇺🇸💭 die with this SHAMBLES? Meanwhile Garcia told Balogun 'NOT YOUR FAULT 😌' as EUROPEAN BACKLASH 🌍😡 over Trump-FIFA drama won't WORRY Infantino 🤑 who keeps the CIRCUS 🎪 rolling! Long-term USA has CATCHING UP to do but at least the NATION talked SOCCER for WEEKS – small WINS 🏆 in a country where FOOTBALL still feels like a VISITOR 👋!
